visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man's face, seen through a narrow opening in a white, weathered door. The man has a sweaty, intense expression, with his mouth open as if he's shouting. He has dark, disheveled hair and a light beard. He wears a dark red garment. The camera is tight on his face, emphasizing his aggressive look. The audio opens with a man's deep, menacing voice speaking slowly and with a threatening tone, "Here's Johnny." His words are immediately followed by a high-pitched, terrified scream from a woman. The camera cuts to a medium shot of a woman standing in front of the same white door. She has long, dark hair and is wearing a blue jacket over a plaid shirt. She holds a large kitchen knife in her right hand, pointing it upwards. Her face is contorted in a scream, and she gestures with her left hand in a panicked manner. The shot returns to the close-up of the man in the door opening. His expression is now a wide, menacing grin, showing his teeth. The camera remains static, holding the tight focus on his face as he looks from side to side. The man then lets out a low, guttural, and aggressive growl,
